validations.logic: Staff material routes require authenticated staff user.
School download routes require authenticated school user scoped to own school.
Material generation/release requires locked exam slot assignment.
Material generation requires locked roster.
Answer sheet generation requires candidate IDs.
Material generation/release requires payment gate passed/waived/credited unless approved override.
Question paper generation requires approved content set.
Material generation requires active template version.
Question paper release requires dual approval.
Same user cannot generate and final approve high-risk release.
Scheduled release time must be valid against exam slot timing policy.
Early/manual release override requires reason and dual approval.
Material files must be private; public URLs forbidden.
Signed URLs must be short lived and school/file scoped.
Download access is checked server-side; browser status is never trusted.
Replacement creates new version and supersedes old version.
Revoked packages/files cannot be downloaded.
Slot/roster changes after generation require material impact review.
Revoked/superseded package cannot be handed off to courier.
Material exports require reason and audit.
Material records/files/events are archived/revoked/superseded, not hard deleted.

_meta.generator_note: Semantic compiled module spec; not a CSV-row wrapper.
